title: Pinterest (PINS) Q1 2026 Earnings: Stock Jumps as AI Shopping and tvScientific Fuel Optimism
text: Pinterest's stock surged following its Q1 2026 earnings beat and strong outlook. The company reported adjusted EPS of $0.27 versus $0.23 expected and revenue of over $1 billion versus $966 million expected. Growth drivers included AI shopping initiatives and the tvScientific acquisition. The global AI shopping market is expected to grow from $4.3 billion in 2025 to $37.4 billion by 2034, presenting a significant opportunity for Pinterest to expand its revenue streams. The company's AI assistant features are turning Pinterest from an image discovery platform into a shopping destination, enabling higher monetization. Q2 2026 guidance was bullish with expected revenue of $1.13-$1.15 billion versus the $1.11 billion Wall Street consensus. Analyst coverage remained strong with 53 analysts covering the stock, with expected earnings growth of 16.2% annually and revenue growth of 11.2% annually.
